ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ipr_terms" (
  "ipr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IPR record */,
  "ipr_term" TEXT /* Term representing the intellectual property rights */,
  "ipr_description" TEXT /* Description of the IPR term */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the IPR */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the IPR */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the IPR record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the IPR record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ipr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source for direct access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_terms" (
  "source_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source term */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the term */,
  "source_term" TEXT /* Term used in the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source term */,
  "term_type" TEXT /* Type of the term */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_terms_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ipr_alignments" (
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alignment record */,
  "ipr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IPR associated with this alignment */,
  "source_term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source term */,
  "alignment_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the alignment in the sequence */,
  "alignment_score" REAL /* Score of the alignment */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence associated with the alignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ipr_alignments_source_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_term_id") REFERENCES source_terms ("source_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ipr_alignments_ipr_id FOREIGN KEY ("ipr_id") REFERENCES ipr_terms ("ipr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, legal, compliance) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "table_accessed" TEXT /* Table that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to notify */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
